vocab.example: The spatial arrangement of a room, including the position of the desk relative to the window, can impact one's focus.

vocab.meaning: đối mặt với sự bừa bộn
vocab.example: When confronted with clutter, many students find it nearly impossible to organize their thoughts effectively.

vocab.meaning: một thánh đường học tập (không gian yên tĩnh, lý tưởng)
vocab.example: A well-equipped library serves as a sanctuary of learning, shielding students from the chaos of the outside world.
A cramped and poorly lit workspace can stifle creativity and make even simple tasks feel like a chore.
Surrounding oneself with books and educational posters creates an intellectually stimulating atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: đạt được trạng thái cực kỳ tập trung (trạng thái dòng chảy)
vocab.example: The primary goal of a good environment is to help the learner attain a flow state, where time seems to disappear.

vocab.meaning: có hại cho sự tập trung
vocab.example: Frequent interruptions from family members are highly detrimental to concentration during exam season.

vocab.meaning: điều kiện ánh sáng tối ưu
vocab.example: Optimal lighting conditions, preferably natural sunlight, are essential to reduce eye strain while reading.

vocab.meaning: sự thoải mái về mặt tâm lý
vocab.example: A personalized study nook provides the psychological comfort needed to tackle challenging subjects.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy/cải thiện kết quả học tập
vocab.example: Research consistently shows that a quiet, dedicated space can significantly bolster academic performance.
